---
title: "ggsql + dbt"
subtitle: "visualization as a pipeline output"
author: "posit hackathon 2026"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: false
    footer: "posit hackathon 2026"
    logo: ""
    transition: fade
    background-transition: fade
    code-block-height: 400px
    highlight-style: github
    css: posit.css
---

## the problem

sql engineers build their entire pipeline without leaving their query editor.
at the last step, they hand finished tables to analysts who reload them
into tableau or looker — **just to see what's already there.**

<br>

::: {.fragment}
the sql is already written. the data is cleaned and prepped.<br>

_what if visualizations were generated as part of the pipeline_?
:::

---

## the idea

dbt already transforms raw data into clean, analysis-ready tables.
ggsql extends sql with visualization syntax.
together, they let the pipeline output plots or charts directly — **with no bi tool in between.**

<br>

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
**the old handoff:**

```
dbt run
  → mart table
    → import to looker
      → build dashboard
        → share link
```
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
::: {.fragment}
**the new output:**

```sql
FROM revenue_by_region
VISUALISE region AS x,
  total_revenue AS y
DRAW bar
LABEL title => 'revenue'
```
:::
:::
:::

---

## you could, but why dbt?

::: {.callout-tip title="claude wisdom bomb!" style="font-size:0.85em;"}

dbt likely has somewhere between 150,000 and 300,000 active practitioners worldwide, with roughly 200,000–250,000 being the most plausible range.

* ~50,000 teams use dbt weekly
* 100,000+ community members
* 5,000–6,000 paying organizations.
* Very broad adoption across Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, and Redshift ecosystems. 

:::

::: {.fragment }

- Tristan Handy was just on the test set podcast and is a Posit fan

:::

::: {.fragment style="font-size:0.85em; text-align:right;"}

Hat tip to Michael and the test set team!

:::

---

## how it works {background-color="#DEF1EB"}

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:flex-start;padding-top:0.8em;">
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 760 355" width="760" height="355" font-family="'Nunito Sans',system-ui,sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <marker id="hw-a" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="7" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0,8 3,0 6" fill="#94D2BD"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="hw-ao" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="7" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0,8 3,0 6" fill="#FFB8A8"/>
    </marker>
    <filter id="hw-s"><feDropShadow dx="0" dy="1" stdDeviation="3" flood-color="#00000012"/></filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- ── SOURCES ── -->
  <rect x="10" y="30" width="128" height="138" rx="8" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#hw-s)"/>
  <rect x="10" y="30" width="128" height="24" rx="8" fill="#64748B"/>
  <rect x="10" y="42"  width="128" height="12" fill="#64748B"/>
  <text x="74" y="46" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10.5" font-weight="600" fill="#F9F9F9">sources</text>
  <text x="74" y="74"  text-anchor="middle" font-size="9.5" fill="#64748B">csv / parquet</text>
  <text x="74" y="92"  text-anchor="middle" font-size="9.5" fill="#64748B">fivetran</text>
  <text x="74" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9.5" fill="#64748B">airbyte</text>
  <text x="74" y="128" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9"   fill="#94D2BD">· · ·</text>
  <text x="74" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8"   fill="#94D2BD" font-style="italic">any flat file source</text>

  <!-- sources → dbt -->
  <line x1="138" y1="99" x2="156" y2="99" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#hw-a)"/>

  <!-- ── DBT BLOCK ── -->
  <rect x="158" y="30" width="372" height="138" rx="8" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#hw-s)"/>
  <rect x="158" y="30" width="372" height="24" rx="8" fill="#FF694B"/>
  <rect x="158" y="42"  width="372" height="12" fill="#FF694B"/>
  <text x="344" y="46" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="600" fill="#F9F9F9">dbt build</text>

  <!-- substep: seeds -->
  <rect x="168" y="60" width="104" height="96" rx="6" fill="#FFF3F0" stroke="#FFB8A8" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="220" y="77" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#FF694B">seeds/</text>
  <text x="220" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#64748B">load raw csv</text>
  <text x="220" y="111" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#64748B">into duckdb</text>
  <text x="220" y="147" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8"   fill="#94D2BD" font-style="italic">raw tables</text>

  <!-- seeds → staging -->
  <line x1="272" y1="108" x2="286" y2="108" stroke="#FFB8A8" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#hw-ao)"/>

  <!-- substep: staging -->
  <rect x="288" y="60" width="110" height="96" rx="6" fill="#FFF3F0" stroke="#FFB8A8" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="343" y="77" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#FF694B">staging/</text>
  <text x="343" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#64748B">clean &amp; type-cast</text>
  <text x="343" y="111" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#64748B">add columns</text>
  <text x="343" y="147" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8"   fill="#94D2BD" font-style="italic">views</text>

  <!-- staging → marts -->
  <line x1="398" y1="108" x2="412" y2="108" stroke="#FFB8A8" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#hw-ao)"/>

  <!-- substep: marts -->
  <rect x="414" y="60" width="106" height="96" rx="6" fill="#FFF3F0" stroke="#FF694B" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="467" y="77" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#FF694B">marts/</text>
  <text x="467" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#64748B">analysis-ready</text>
  <text x="467" y="111" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#64748B">tables</text>
  <text x="467" y="147" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8"   fill="#94D2BD" font-style="italic">tables + parquet</text>

  <!-- dbt → duckdb (down) -->
  <line x1="344" y1="168" x2="344" y2="218" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#hw-a)"/>
  <text x="352" y="197" font-size="8" fill="#94D2BD" font-style="italic">writes to</text>

  <!-- ── DUCKDB ── -->
  <rect x="234" y="220" width="220" height="66" rx="8" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#E9D8A6" stroke-width="2.5" filter="url(#hw-s)"/>
  <rect x="234" y="220" width="220" height="24" rx="8" fill="#E9D8A6"/>
  <rect x="234" y="232" width="220" height="12" fill="#E9D8A6"/>
  <text x="344" y="236" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="600" fill="#001219">duckdb</text>
  <text x="344" y="262" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9"   fill="#64748B">nba_finals.duckdb  ·  parquet exports</text>
  <text x="344" y="277" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8"   fill="#94D2BD" font-style="italic">mart tables live here</text>

  <!-- duckdb → ggsql (right then up) -->
  <polyline points="454,253 660,253 660,168" fill="none" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#hw-a)"/>
  <text x="570" y="247" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#94D2BD" font-style="italic">reads parquet</text>

  <!-- ── GGSQL ── -->
  <rect x="552" y="30" width="198" height="138" rx="8" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#0A9396" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#hw-s)"/>
  <rect x="552" y="30" width="198" height="24" rx="8" fill="#0A9396"/>
  <rect x="552" y="42"  width="198" height="12" fill="#0A9396"/>
  <text x="651" y="46" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="600" fill="#F9F9F9">ggsql</text>
  <rect x="562" y="60" width="178" height="68" rx="5" fill="#DEF1EB"/>
  <text x="572" y="76" font-size="8.5" fill="#005F73" font-family="monospace">FROM mart_shot_chart</text>
  <text x="572" y="92" font-size="8.5" fill="#005F73" font-family="monospace">VISUALISE loc_x AS x,</text>
  <text x="572" y="108" font-size="8.5" fill="#005F73" font-family="monospace">  loc_y AS y</text>
  <text x="572" y="124" font-size="8.5" fill="#005F73" font-family="monospace">DRAW point</text>
  <rect x="562" y="136" width="178" height="22" rx="4" fill="#005F73"/>
  <text x="651" y="151" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9.5" font-weight="600" fill="#F9F9F9">&#x2192; vega-lite chart</text>

  <!-- ── BOTTOM NOTE ── -->
  <rect x="10" y="308" width="740" height="28" rx="6" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="380" y="326" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#64748B">files can arrive from fivetran, airbyte, or any tool that writes csv or parquet &#x2014; dbt and ggsql only speak sql</text>
</svg>
</div>
```

## same sql. no bi tool.

```{.sql}
FROM revenue_by_region          -- dbt mart table
VISUALISE region AS x,
         total_revenue AS y,
         segment AS color
DRAW bar
  SETTING position => 'dodge'
LABEL title => 'revenue by region'
```

::: {.fragment}
that query is the complete visualization spec — no dashboard tool, no separate layer, no handoff.

**anyone who writes sql already speaks this language.** 
:::

::: {.fragment style="font-size:0.85em; text-align:right;"}

(_and everyone that "dbts" does_)

:::

---

## option a · ggsql cli {background-color="#DEF1EB"}

**minimum viable output.** sql people run one command — they get charts.

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:flex-start;padding-top:0.8em;">
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 740 340" width="740" height="340" font-family="'Nunito Sans',system-ui,sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <marker id="a1" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="7" refY="3" orient="auto"><polygon points="0 0,8 3,0 6" fill="#94D2BD"/></marker>
    <marker id="ab" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="7" refY="3" orient="auto"><polygon points="0 0,8 3,0 6" fill="#0A9396"/></marker>
    <filter id="sh"><feDropShadow dx="0" dy="1" stdDeviation="3" flood-color="#00000010"/></filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- dbt block -->
  <rect x="10" y="20" width="168" height="230" rx="8" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#sh)"/>
  <rect x="10" y="20" width="168" height="26" rx="8" fill="#FF694B"/>
  <rect x="10" y="34"  width="168" height="12" fill="#FF694B"/>
  <text x="94" y="38" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#F9F9F9">dbt build</text>
  <text x="94" y="74"  text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">seeds/</text>
  <text x="94" y="92"  text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">↓  staging/</text>
  <text x="94" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">↓  marts/</text>
  <rect x="26" y="130" width="136" height="24" rx="5" fill="#DEF1EB" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="94" y="146" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9.5" fill="#005F73" font-family="monospace">5 parquet exports</text>

  <!-- trunk + branches -->
  <line x1="178" y1="142" x2="206" y2="142" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#a1)"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="142" x2="206" y2="80"  stroke="#0A9396" stroke-width="2"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="80"  x2="228" y2="80"  stroke="#0A9396" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#ab)"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="142" x2="206" y2="182" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="182" x2="228" y2="182" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="142" x2="206" y2="268" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="268" x2="228" y2="268" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>

  <!-- row b — active -->
  <rect x="228" y="52" width="158" height="56" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#0A9396" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#sh)"/>
  <rect x="228" y="52" width="158" height="20" rx="7" fill="#0A9396"/>
  <rect x="228" y="62"  width="158" height="10" fill="#0A9396"/>
  <text x="307" y="66" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10.5" font-weight="700" fill="#F9F9F9">ggsql cli</text>
  <text x="307" y="84" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#005F73" font-family="monospace">OUTPUT=cli make</text>
  <text x="307" y="99" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#64748B">runs ggsql on each .ggsql file</text>
  <line x1="386" y1="80" x2="410" y2="80" stroke="#0A9396" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#ab)"/>
  <rect x="410" y="52" width="318" height="56" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#005F73" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#sh)"/>
  <rect x="410" y="52" width="318" height="20" rx="7" fill="#005F73"/>
  <rect x="410" y="62"  width="318" height="10" fill="#005F73"/>
  <text x="569" y="66" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10.5" font-weight="700" fill="#F9F9F9">output/charts/</text>
  <text x="569" y="84" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#001219" font-family="monospace">shot_chart_knicks_cavs.html</text>
  <text x="569" y="99" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#001219" font-family="monospace">game_margins.html  + 9 more</text>

  <!-- row c — ghost -->
  <rect x="228" y="158" width="158" height="48" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/>
  <text x="307" y="186" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#94D2BD">make static</text>
  <rect x="410" y="158" width="318" height="48" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/>
  <text x="569" y="186" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#94D2BD">output/static/index.html</text>

  <!-- row a — ghost -->
  <rect x="228" y="244" width="158" height="48" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/>
  <text x="307" y="272" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#94D2BD">quarto render</text>
  <rect x="410" y="244" width="318" height="48" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/>
  <text x="569" y="272" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#94D2BD">nba_report.html</text>

  <!-- dependency strip -->
  <rect x="10" y="304" width="720" height="30" rx="6" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="22" y="322" font-size="9.5" fill="#64748B">needs:</text>
  <rect x="68"  y="311" width="88"  height="17" rx="8" fill="#FF694B"/>
  <text x="112" y="323" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#F9F9F9" font-weight="600">dbt-duckdb</text>
  <rect x="162" y="311" width="76"  height="17" rx="8" fill="#0A9396"/>
  <text x="200" y="323" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#F9F9F9" font-weight="600">ggsql cli</text>
  <text x="708" y="322" text-anchor="end" font-size="9.5" fill="#005F73" font-weight="600">sql → 11 charts, no narrative</text>
</svg>
</div>
```

---

## option b · static bundle {background-color="#DEF1EB"}

**add a makefile.** charts get an index page — deployable anywhere as static files.

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:flex-start;padding-top:0.8em;">
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 740 340" width="740" height="340" font-family="'Nunito Sans',system-ui,sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <marker id="a2" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="7" refY="3" orient="auto"><polygon points="0 0,8 3,0 6" fill="#94D2BD"/></marker>
    <marker id="ac" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="7" refY="3" orient="auto"><polygon points="0 0,8 3,0 6" fill="#005F73"/></marker>
    <filter id="sh"><feDropShadow dx="0" dy="1" stdDeviation="3" flood-color="#00000010"/></filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- dbt block -->
  <rect x="10" y="20" width="168" height="230" rx="8" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#sh)"/>
  <rect x="10" y="20" width="168" height="26" rx="8" fill="#FF694B"/>
  <rect x="10" y="34"  width="168" height="12" fill="#FF694B"/>
  <text x="94" y="38" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#F9F9F9">dbt build</text>
  <text x="94" y="74"  text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">seeds/</text>
  <text x="94" y="92"  text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">↓  staging/</text>
  <text x="94" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">↓  marts/</text>
  <rect x="26" y="130" width="136" height="24" rx="5" fill="#DEF1EB" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="94" y="146" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9.5" fill="#005F73" font-family="monospace">5 parquet exports</text>

  <!-- trunk + branches -->
  <line x1="178" y1="142" x2="206" y2="142" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#a2)"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="142" x2="206" y2="80"  stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="80"  x2="228" y2="80"  stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="142" x2="206" y2="182" stroke="#005F73" stroke-width="2"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="182" x2="228" y2="182" stroke="#005F73" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#ac)"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="142" x2="206" y2="268" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="268" x2="228" y2="268" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>

  <!-- row b — dimmed -->
  <rect x="228" y="52" width="158" height="56" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/>
  <rect x="228" y="52" width="158" height="20" rx="7" fill="#94D2BD" opacity="0.5"/>
  <text x="307" y="66" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10.5" fill="#F9F9F9" opacity="0.7">ggsql cli</text>
  <text x="307" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#64748B" opacity="0.6">charts/*.html</text>
  <rect x="410" y="52" width="318" height="56" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/>
  <text x="569" y="84" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#64748B" opacity="0.6">output/charts/ (11 files)</text>

  <!-- row c — active -->
  <rect x="228" y="158" width="158" height="56" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#005F73" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#sh)"/>
  <rect x="228" y="158" width="158" height="20" rx="7" fill="#005F73"/>
  <rect x="228" y="168" width="158" height="10" fill="#005F73"/>
  <text x="307" y="172" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10.5" font-weight="700" fill="#F9F9F9">make static</text>
  <text x="307" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#005F73" font-family="monospace">OUTPUT=static make</text>
  <text x="307" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#64748B">assembles index page</text>
  <line x1="386" y1="182" x2="410" y2="182" stroke="#005F73" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#ac)"/>
  <rect x="410" y="158" width="318" height="56" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#005F73" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#sh)"/>
  <rect x="410" y="158" width="318" height="20" rx="7" fill="#005F73"/>
  <rect x="410" y="168" width="318" height="10" fill="#005F73"/>
  <text x="569" y="172" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10.5" font-weight="700" fill="#F9F9F9">output/static/</text>
  <text x="569" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#001219" font-family="monospace">index.html  +  charts/</text>
  <text x="569" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#64748B">grid of links, no runtime needed</text>

  <!-- row a — ghost -->
  <rect x="228" y="244" width="158" height="48" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/>
  <text x="307" y="272" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#94D2BD">quarto render</text>
  <rect x="410" y="244" width="318" height="48" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/>
  <text x="569" y="272" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#94D2BD">nba_report.html</text>

  <!-- dependency strip -->
  <rect x="10" y="304" width="720" height="30" rx="6" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="22" y="322" font-size="9.5" fill="#64748B">needs:</text>
  <rect x="68"  y="311" width="88"  height="17" rx="8" fill="#FF694B"/>
  <text x="112" y="323" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#F9F9F9" font-weight="600">dbt-duckdb</text>
  <rect x="162" y="311" width="76"  height="17" rx="8" fill="#0A9396"/>
  <text x="200" y="323" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#F9F9F9" font-weight="600">ggsql cli</text>
  <rect x="244" y="311" width="46"  height="17" rx="8" fill="#005F73"/>
  <text x="267" y="323" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#F9F9F9" font-weight="600">make</text>
  <text x="708" y="322" text-anchor="end" font-size="9.5" fill="#005F73" font-weight="600">11 charts + navigable index, static</text>
</svg>
</div>
```

---

## option c · full report {background-color="#DEF1EB"}

**add quarto.** the pipeline gains narrative, toc, and a scheduled publish to connect.

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:flex-start;padding-top:0.8em;">
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 740 360" width="740" height="360" font-family="'Nunito Sans',system-ui,sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <marker id="a3" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="7" refY="3" orient="auto"><polygon points="0 0,8 3,0 6" fill="#94D2BD"/></marker>
    <marker id="aa" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="7" refY="3" orient="auto"><polygon points="0 0,8 3,0 6" fill="#447099"/></marker>
    <filter id="sh"><feDropShadow dx="0" dy="1" stdDeviation="3" flood-color="#00000010"/></filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- dbt block -->
  <rect x="10" y="20" width="168" height="250" rx="8" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#sh)"/>
  <rect x="10" y="20" width="168" height="26" rx="8" fill="#FF694B"/>
  <rect x="10" y="34"  width="168" height="12" fill="#FF694B"/>
  <text x="94" y="38" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#F9F9F9">dbt build</text>
  <text x="94" y="74"  text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">seeds/</text>
  <text x="94" y="92"  text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">↓  staging/</text>
  <text x="94" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#64748B">↓  marts/</text>
  <rect x="26" y="130" width="136" height="24" rx="5" fill="#DEF1EB" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="94" y="146" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9.5" fill="#005F73" font-family="monospace">5 parquet exports</text>

  <!-- trunk + branches -->
  <line x1="178" y1="145" x2="206" y2="145" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#a3)"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="145" x2="206" y2="80"  stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="80"  x2="228" y2="80"  stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="145" x2="206" y2="185" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="185" x2="228" y2="185" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="145" x2="206" y2="285" stroke="#447099" stroke-width="2"/>
  <line x1="206" y1="285" x2="228" y2="285" stroke="#447099" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#aa)"/>

  <!-- row b — dimmed -->
  <rect x="228" y="54" width="158" height="52" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.45"/>
  <rect x="228" y="54" width="158" height="18" rx="7" fill="#94D2BD" opacity="0.45"/>
  <text x="307" y="67" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#F9F9F9" opacity="0.6">ggsql cli</text>
  <text x="307" y="88" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#64748B" opacity="0.5">charts/*.html</text>
  <rect x="410" y="54" width="318" height="52" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.45"/>
  <text x="569" y="82" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#64748B" opacity="0.5">output/charts/</text>

  <!-- row c — dimmed -->
  <rect x="228" y="160" width="158" height="52" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.45"/>
  <rect x="228" y="160" width="158" height="18" rx="7" fill="#94D2BD" opacity="0.45"/>
  <text x="307" y="173" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#F9F9F9" opacity="0.6">make static</text>
  <text x="307" y="194" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#64748B" opacity="0.5">index.html</text>
  <rect x="410" y="160" width="318" height="52" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.45"/>
  <text x="569" y="188" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#64748B" opacity="0.5">output/static/</text>

  <!-- row a — active -->
  <rect x="228" y="256" width="158" height="68" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#447099" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#sh)"/>
  <rect x="228" y="256" width="158" height="22" rx="7" fill="#447099"/>
  <rect x="228" y="267" width="158" height="11" fill="#447099"/>
  <text x="307" y="271" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10.5" font-weight="700" fill="#F9F9F9">quarto render</text>
  <text x="307" y="291" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#447099" font-family="monospace">nba_report.qmd</text>
  <text x="307" y="307" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#64748B">{bash} dbt · {ggsql} charts</text>
  <line x1="386" y1="290" x2="410" y2="290" stroke="#447099" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#aa)"/>
  <rect x="410" y="256" width="318" height="68" rx="7" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#447099" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#sh)"/>
  <rect x="410" y="256" width="318" height="22" rx="7" fill="#447099"/>
  <rect x="410" y="267" width="318" height="11" fill="#447099"/>
  <text x="569" y="271" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10.5" font-weight="700" fill="#F9F9F9">nba_report.html</text>
  <text x="569" y="291" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#001219">narrative + toc + 17 charts</text>
  <text x="569" y="307" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#64748B">scheduled on posit connect</text>

  <!-- dependency strip -->
  <rect x="10" y="338" width="720" height="16" rx="6" fill="#F9F9F9" stroke="#94D2BD" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="22" y="350" font-size="9" fill="#64748B">needs:</text>
  <rect x="66"  y="341" width="82"  height="13" rx="6" fill="#FF694B"/>
  <text x="107" y="351" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7.5" fill="#F9F9F9" font-weight="600">dbt-duckdb</text>
  <rect x="154" y="341" width="68"  height="13" rx="6" fill="#0A9396"/>
  <text x="188" y="351" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7.5" fill="#F9F9F9" font-weight="600">ggsql cli</text>
  <rect x="228" y="341" width="42"  height="13" rx="6" fill="#005F73"/>
  <text x="249" y="351" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7.5" fill="#F9F9F9" font-weight="600">make</text>
  <rect x="276" y="341" width="56"  height="13" rx="6" fill="#447099"/>
  <text x="304" y="351" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7.5" fill="#F9F9F9" font-weight="600">quarto</text>
  <rect x="338" y="341" width="96"  height="13" rx="6" fill="#001219"/>
  <text x="386" y="351" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7.5" fill="#F9F9F9" font-weight="600">posit connect</text>
  <text x="708" y="351" text-anchor="end" font-size="9" fill="#447099" font-weight="600">full report, scheduled, emailed</text>
</svg>
</div>
```

---

## hooks are nice, <br> built-in would be better {background-color="#DEF1EB"} 
<br>

**Lets add new functional NodeType.Visualization 
to dbt core**

<br>


::: {style="font-size:0.75em; color:#94D2BD;"}
(_Turns out there is a new Rust dbt version on main but it has not yet been released.  So... lets update the current python release of dbt for now._)
:::



---

## visualization as a native dbt node {background-color="#DEF1EB" auto-animate=true}

```{=html}
<div style="position:relative;width:740px;height:290px;margin:0 auto;font-family:'Nunito Sans',system-ui,sans-serif;">
  <div data-id="v-sources" style="position:absolute;top:28px;left:0;width:118px;height:110px;background:#F9F9F9;border:1.5px solid #94D2BD;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 1px 6px #00000010;">
    <div style="background:#64748B;color:#F9F9F9;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;padding:5px 0;text-align:center;">sources</div>
    <div style="font-size:8.5px;color:#64748B;text-align:center;padding-top:10px;line-height:2;">csv / parquet<br>fivetran · airbyte</div>
  </div>
  <div style="position:absolute;top:81px;left:120px;width:18px;height:2px;background:#94D2BD;"></div>
  <div style="position:absolute;top:77px;left:135px;font-size:11px;color:#94D2BD;line-height:1;">▶</div>
  <div data-id="v-dbt" style="position:absolute;top:28px;left:148px;width:322px;height:110px;background:#F9F9F9;border:1.5px solid #94D2BD;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 1px 6px #00000010;">
    <div style="background:#FF694B;color:#F9F9F9;font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;padding:5px 0;text-align:center;border-radius:7px 7px 0 0;">dbt build</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:3px;padding:7px 6px 0;">
      <div style="flex:1;background:#FFF3F0;border:1px solid #FFB8A8;border-radius:4px;padding:5px 3px;text-align:center;font-size:8.5px;color:#FF694B;font-weight:600;">seeds</div>
      <div style="color:#FFB8A8;align-self:center;font-size:9px;padding:0 1px;">→</div>
      <div style="flex:1;background:#FFF3F0;border:1px solid #FFB8A8;border-radius:4px;padding:5px 3px;text-align:center;font-size:8.5px;color:#FF694B;font-weight:600;">staging</div>
      <div style="color:#FFB8A8;align-self:center;font-size:9px;padding:0 1px;">→</div>
      <div style="flex:1;background:#FFF3F0;border:1.5px solid #FF694B;border-radius:4px;padding:5px 3px;text-align:center;font-size:8.5px;color:#FF694B;font-weight:600;">marts</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div data-id="v-arr-down" style="position:absolute;top:140px;left:308px;width:2px;height:68px;background:#94D2BD;"></div>
  <div style="position:absolute;top:205px;left:304px;font-size:10px;color:#94D2BD;line-height:1;">▼</div>
  <div data-id="v-duckdb" style="position:absolute;top:214px;left:198px;width:220px;height:60px;background:#F9F9F9;border:2px solid #E9D8A6;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 1px 6px #00000010;">
    <div style="background:#E9D8A6;color:#001219;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;padding:4px 0;text-align:center;">duckdb</div>
    <div style="font-size:8px;color:#64748B;text-align:center;padding-top:5px;">parquet exports</div>
  </div>
  <div data-id="v-arr-ggsql" style="position:absolute;top:243px;left:418px;width:84px;height:2px;background:#94D2BD;opacity:1;"></div>
  <div data-id="v-arr-ggsql2" style="position:absolute;top:136px;left:500px;width:2px;height:107px;background:#94D2BD;opacity:1;"></div>
  <div data-id="v-arr-ggsql3" style="position:absolute;top:132px;left:496px;font-size:10px;color:#94D2BD;opacity:1;line-height:1;">▲</div>
  <div data-id="v-ggsql" style="position:absolute;top:28px;left:502px;width:200px;height:110px;background:#F9F9F9;border:2px solid #0A9396;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 1px 8px #00000015;z-index:10;">
    <div style="background:#0A9396;color:#F9F9F9;font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;padding:5px 0;text-align:center;">ggsql</div>
    <div style="background:#DEF1EB;margin:6px 6px 4px;border-radius:4px;padding:4px 5px;font-size:7.5px;color:#005F73;font-family:monospace;line-height:1.7;">FROM mart_shot_chart<br>VISUALISE loc_x AS x<br>DRAW point</div>
    <div style="margin:0 6px;background:#005F73;border-radius:3px;padding:2px 0;text-align:center;font-size:8px;font-weight:600;color:#F9F9F9;">→ vega-lite chart</div>
  </div>
  <div data-id="v-label" style="position:absolute;top:7px;left:502px;font-size:8px;color:#94D2BD;font-style:italic;">external tool</div>
</div>
```

---

## visualization as a native dbt node {background-color="#DEF1EB" auto-animate=true}

```{=html}
<div style="position:relative;width:740px;height:290px;margin:0 auto;font-family:'Nunito Sans',system-ui,sans-serif;">
  <div data-id="v-sources" style="position:absolute;top:28px;left:0;width:118px;height:110px;background:#F9F9F9;border:1.5px solid #94D2BD;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 1px 6px #00000010;">
    <div style="background:#64748B;color:#F9F9F9;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;padding:5px 0;text-align:center;">sources</div>
    <div style="font-size:8.5px;color:#64748B;text-align:center;padding-top:10px;line-height:2;">csv / parquet<br>fivetran · airbyte</div>
  </div>
  <div style="position:absolute;top:81px;left:120px;width:18px;height:2px;background:#94D2BD;"></div>
  <div style="position:absolute;top:77px;left:135px;font-size:11px;color:#94D2BD;line-height:1;">▶</div>
  <div data-id="v-dbt" style="position:absolute;top:10px;left:148px;width:580px;height:140px;background:#F9F9F9;border:1.5px solid #94D2BD;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 1px 6px #00000010;">
    <div style="background:#FF694B;color:#F9F9F9;font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;padding:5px 0;text-align:center;border-radius:7px 7px 0 0;">dbt build</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:3px;padding:10px 6px 0;">
      <div style="flex:1;background:#FFF3F0;border:1px solid #FFB8A8;border-radius:4px;padding:8px 3px;text-align:center;font-size:8.5px;color:#FF694B;font-weight:600;">seeds</div>
      <div style="color:#FFB8A8;align-self:center;font-size:9px;padding:0 1px;">→</div>
      <div style="flex:1;background:#FFF3F0;border:1px solid #FFB8A8;border-radius:4px;padding:8px 3px;text-align:center;font-size:8.5px;color:#FF694B;font-weight:600;">staging</div>
      <div style="color:#FFB8A8;align-self:center;font-size:9px;padding:0 1px;">→</div>
      <div style="flex:1;background:#FFF3F0;border:1.5px solid #FF694B;border-radius:4px;padding:8px 3px;text-align:center;font-size:8.5px;color:#FF694B;font-weight:600;">marts</div>
      <div style="color:#0A9396;align-self:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;padding:0 2px;">→</div>
      <div style="flex:1.4;background:#DEF1EB;border:2px solid #0A9396;border-radius:4px;padding:8px 3px;text-align:center;font-size:8.5px;color:#0A9396;font-weight:700;">visualization</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div data-id="v-ggsql" style="position:absolute;top:28px;left:502px;width:200px;height:110px;background:#F9F9F9;border:2px solid #0A9396;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 1px 8px #00000015;z-index:10;">
    <div style="background:#0A9396;color:#F9F9F9;font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;padding:5px 0;text-align:center;">ggsql</div>
    <div style="background:#DEF1EB;margin:6px 6px 4px;border-radius:4px;padding:4px 5px;font-size:7.5px;color:#005F73;font-family:monospace;line-height:1.7;">FROM mart_shot_chart<br>VISUALISE loc_x AS x<br>DRAW point</div>
    <div style="margin:0 6px;background:#005F73;border-radius:3px;padding:2px 0;text-align:center;font-size:8px;font-weight:600;color:#F9F9F9;">→ vega-lite chart</div>
  </div>
  <div data-id="v-label" style="position:absolute;top:7px;left:502px;font-size:8px;color:#0A9396;font-style:italic;font-weight:600;">native node type</div>
  <div class="fragment" style="position:absolute;top:140px;left:494px;width:216px;background:#005F73;border-radius:7px;padding:7px 0;text-align:center;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#F9F9F9;letter-spacing:0.6px;z-index:20;">new native node type</div>
</div>
```

::: {.fragment style="color:#94D2BD; text-align:right;"}

now that is getting somewhere...

:::

---

## what could be next {background-color="#DEF1EB"}

::: {.incremental}
- talk to real dbt users — does the handoff to looker feel like a feature, or a gap?

- if it's a gap — find the right form to ship this. dbt plugin, community package, or a pr to dbt-core.

- bring that pr to dbt-labs. twelve files. one new node type. 

:::

::: {.fragment}

one question: <br> **does visualization (via ggsql) belong in the dbt pipeline?**

:::

::: {.fragment style="color:#94D2BD; text-align:right;"}

if so, step 4 **...PROFIT!?!**

:::


## Thanks! {background-color="#DEF1EB"}
